qry:select.name: RS1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_personal_emp AS ID, PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.e_numero_legajo AS CODE, PER01_PERSONAL.d_ape_y_nom AS TEXT, ORG03_EMPRESAS.c_empresa, ORG03_EMPRESAS.d_empresa FROM PER02_PERSONAL_EMP, ORG03_EMPRESAS, PER01_PERSONAL JOIN PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.OI_PERSONAL INNER PER01_PERSONAL.OI_PERSONAL, PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_empresa INNER ORG03_EMPRESAS.oi_empresa WHERE PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_personal_emp = {#SOURCE:helper-mess/@ID} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: RS1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT ORG03_EMPRESAS.oi_empresa AS ID, ORG03_EMPRESAS.c_empresa AS CODE, ORG03_EMPRESAS.d_empresa AS TEXT FROM ORG03_EMPRESAS WHERE ORG03_EMPRESAS.c_empresa = {substring_before(#SOURCE:helper-mess/@CODE,\'-\')} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: RS2
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_personal_emp AS ID, PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.e_numero_legajo AS CODE, PER01_PERSONAL.d_ape_y_nom AS TEXT, ORG03_EMPRESAS.c_empresa, ORG03_EMPRESAS.d_empresa FROM PER02_PERSONAL_EMP, ORG03_EMPRESAS, PER01_PERSONAL JOIN PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.OI_PERSONAL INNER PER01_PERSONAL.OI_PERSONAL, PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_empresa INNER ORG03_EMPRESAS.oi_empresa WHERE PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.e_numero_legajo = {substring_before(#SOURCE:@SUB_SEARCH,\'-\')} AND PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_empresa = {#SOURCE:@PARENTID} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: SECURITY
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT NMD_SECURITY.policy FROM NMD_SECURITY WHERE NMD_SECURITY.class=\'NucleusRH.Base.Personal.LegajoEmpresa.PERSONAL_EMP\' AND NMD_SECURITY.id={#PARAM:@id} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: RS2
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT ORG03_EMPRESAS.oi_empresa AS ID, ORG03_EMPRESAS.c_empresa AS CODE, ORG03_EMPRESAS.d_empresa AS TEXT FROM ORG03_EMPRESAS WHERE ORG03_EMPRESAS.oi_empresa={#SOURCE:@PARENTID} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: RS1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_personal_emp AS ID, PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.e_numero_legajo AS CODE, PER01_PERSONAL.d_ape_y_nom AS TEXT, ORG03_EMPRESAS.c_empresa, ORG03_EMPRESAS.d_empresa FROM PER02_PERSONAL_EMP, ORG03_EMPRESAS, PER01_PERSONAL JOIN PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.OI_PERSONAL INNER PER01_PERSONAL.OI_PERSONAL, PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_empresa INNER ORG03_EMPRESAS.oi_empresa WHERE PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_empresa = {#SOURCE:@PARENTID} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: SECURITY
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT NMD_SECURITY.policy FROM NMD_SECURITY WHERE NMD_SECURITY.class=\'NucleusRH.Base.Personal.LegajoEmpresa.PERSONAL_EMP\' AND NMD_SECURITY.id={#PARAM:@id} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: RS3
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT ORG03_EMPRESAS.oi_empresa AS ID, ORG03_EMPRESAS.c_empresa AS CODE, ORG03_EMPRESAS.d_empresa AS TEXT FROM ORG03_EMPRESAS WHERE ORG03_EMPRESAS.oi_empresa={#SOURCE:@PARENTID}')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: RS2
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_empresa FROM PER02_PERSONAL_EMP WHERE PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_personal_emp={#SOURCE:@ID} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: RS1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_personal_emp, PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.e_numero_legajo, PER01_PERSONAL.d_ape_y_nom FROM PER02_PERSONAL_EMP, PER01_PERSONAL JOIN PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_personal INNER PER01_PERSONAL.oi_personal WHERE PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_empresa={#SOURCE:@PARENTID} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: SECURITY
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT NMD_SECURITY.policy FROM NMD_SECURITY WHERE NMD_SECURITY.class=\'NucleusRH.Base.Personal.LegajoEmpresa.PERSONAL_EMP\' AND NMD_SECURITY.id={#PARAM:@id} ')/ROWS/ROW
